mnemonics: D.A.T.A. (Describe, Analyze, Transform, Apply) - The core steps for understanding data in ML.
keyPoints: Data is the foundation of any machine learning model.
Understanding data involves its structure, quality, and distribution.
The goal is to transform raw data into a format suitable for algorithms.
commonMistakes: Using data without checking for biases or errors first.
Assuming more data always leads to a better model, ignoring data quality.
Applying complex models to poorly understood or unprepared data.
